result.summary: Found a few minor visual and layout issues on the page.

issues.description: Some game tiles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section appear slightly misaligned or cut off at the edges.
issues.suggestion: Adjust margins and padding to ensure consistent spacing and visibility of all game tiles.

issues.description: The text overlay on some game thumbnails might be hard to read against busy backgrounds.
issues.suggestion: Add a subtle shadow or dark gradient behind text overlays to improve readability.

issues.description: The 'i' (info) icons on game tiles are quite small and may be difficult to tap on mobile devices.
issues.suggestion: Increase the size of the info icons or their touch target areas for better usability.
